<task>
Create a summary of key decisions, risks, and action items from a rough meeting transcript.

The transcript contains discussions, ideas, and conclusions from a meeting.
</context>
<constraints>

</constraints>
<output_format>
- # Decisions
- - [Decision 1]
- - [Decision 2]
- # Risks
- - [Risk 1]
- - [Risk 2]
- # Action Items
- - [Action Item 1]
- - [Action Item 2]
</output_format>
